scripts.build: npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/image-cache && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test:integration: npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/image-cache && rm -rf dist-integration .tmp && mkdir -p .tmp && tsc -p tsconfig.integration.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" node --test dist-integration/__tests__/ingestion.test.js
